provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Census Act.

provisions.title: Power to take census
provisions.content:
2. Power to take census
It shall be lawful for the Minister to cause a census to be taken within Botswana at such times as he may appoint by order published in the Gazette and to appoint fit and proper persons to be called census officers for the purpose of conducting the census within such districts as he may assign to them.
